title: Mellow Smoked Russian Mushroom Pilaf
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly one-pot Russian dish featuring fermented mushrooms and a cheese pull, cooked to perfection in a paella pan with a hint of smoke and light brown soft sugar.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the fermented mushrooms and cook until they are lightly browned.
Add the smoked paprika and light brown soft sugar and stir to combine.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the shredded cheese until it is melted and well combined.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
